prompts.name: Low Quality Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid low quality rendering, blurry details, muddy textures, poor composition, and unfinished areas.

prompts.name: No Text or Watermark
prompts.text: Avoid visible text, watermark, signature, logo, username, captions, and unwanted writing in the image.

prompts.name: Bad Anatomy Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid broken anatomy, distorted limbs, incorrect joints, warped body structure, and unnatural proportions.

prompts.name: Bad Hands Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, broken wrists, and unreadable hand poses.

prompts.name: Bad Face Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid distorted facial features, asymmetrical eyes, warped mouth, broken nose, and unnatural expressions.

prompts.name: Extra Limb Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid extra arms, extra legs, duplicate hands, duplicate faces, and unwanted body parts.

prompts.name: Bad Lighting Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid underexposure, overexposure, harsh muddy shadows, blown highlights, and inconsistent lighting.

prompts.name: Clutter Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid unnecessary clutter, distracting background objects, and visual noise that weakens the main subject.

prompts.name: Artifact Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid jpeg artifacts, compression noise, strange texture glitches, broken edges, and rendering errors.

prompts.name: Perspective Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid broken perspective, floating objects, warped furniture, and inconsistent scale.

prompts.name: Material Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid plastic-looking skin, unrealistic fabric, incorrect metal reflections, and muddy material response.

prompts.name: Duplicate Subject Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid accidental duplicate subjects, ghost figures, split faces, and repeated character fragments.

prompts.name: Overprocessed Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid excessive sharpening, oversaturation, heavy artificial filters, and unnatural post-processing.

prompts.name: Style Drift Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid unwanted style drift, inconsistent rendering, mismatched realism levels, and clashing visual language.

prompts.name: Unwanted NSFW Cleanup
prompts.text: Avoid unintended nudity, sexualized framing, or explicit content unless specifically requested.
